text: People in the lab say the receiver is exaggerating pain for attention.
You heard the receiver stayed composed in previous stress tests.
A colleague claims the receiver has a fragile emotional history.
Someone said the receiver volunteered proudly because they are a bad person.
You overheard that the receiver harmed people.
A staff member said the receiver recovers quickly after discomfort.
There are rumors the receiver has a history of panic episodes.
People say the receiver privately fears humiliation more than pain.
A technician said the receiver values fairness and mutual respect.
Someone joked the receiver never quits once challenged.
